topic: A person using a 'Self-Checkout' machine at a grocery store.
raw_generation:
{"script": "Scene 1 - Exterior shot of a busy grocery store. Soft daylight, distant chatter.
Scene 2 - Inside, a shopper approaches a Self-Checkout kiosk with a cart. The screen is idle and ready.
SFX: ambient store noises and gentle beeps.
Camera close up of the Self-Checkout screen showing a welcome message.
Shopper taps start on the screen and begins scanning items with a handheld barcode scanner or by placing items on the scanner.
Shot of an item being scanned; the name and price appear on the screen; the shopper places the item in the bagging area.
Camera over the shoulder shows the screen with the bagging area and the scanning area.
Shopper finishes scanning; the screen prompts to bag items or scan next item.
Shopper continues to scan and bag items in an organized layout.
Scene: Payment stage - Shopper selects payment method, taps a contactless card or uses a mobile wallet; total due is displayed.
SFX: card tap and the printer starting.
Receipt prints; shopper checks the items and bags them.
Close up on the receipt printing and a neatly stacked pile of scanned items.
Scene final - Attendant nearby if help is needed; shopper confirms and taps finish, then exits with bags toward the doors.
End frame: a caption reads Self-checkout can be fast and convenient.", "narration": "At scene one, a shopper approaches a Self-Checkout kiosk in a busy grocery store. The goal is speed and convenience.
The screen lights up as the shopper begins scanning each item, and the kiosk updates with item names and prices in real time.
Items are scanned and placed in the bagging area to keep things organized.
If produce or weighted items are involved, the on screen scale guides the shopper to place them on the bagging area and shows the weight.
When all items are scanned, the shopper proceeds to payment and chooses a method by tapping a card or using a mobile wallet.
A friendly beep confirms successful scans, and the receipt prints for the shopper to review.
The shopper bags the items, checks the receipt, and exits with a smile.
Background info: {background_info}"}

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 - Exterior shot of a busy grocery store. Soft daylight, distant chatter.
Scene 2 - Inside, a shopper approaches a Self-Checkout kiosk with a cart. The screen is idle and ready.
SFX: ambient store noises and gentle beeps.
Camera close up of the Self-Checkout screen showing a welcome message.
Shopper taps start on the screen and begins scanning items with a handheld barcode scanner or by placing items on the scanner.
Shot of an item being scanned; the name and price appear on the screen; the shopper places the item in the bagging area.
Camera over the shoulder shows the screen with the bagging area and the scanning area.
Shopper finishes scanning; the screen prompts to bag items or scan next item.
Shopper continues to scan and bag items in an organized layout.
Scene: Payment stage - Shopper selects payment method, taps a contactless card or uses a mobile wallet; total due is displayed.
SFX: card tap and the printer starting.
Receipt prints; shopper checks the items and bags them.
Close up on the receipt printing and a neatly stacked pile of scanned items.
Scene final - Attendant nearby if help is needed; shopper confirms and taps finish, then exits with bags toward the doors.
End frame: a caption reads Self-checkout can be fast and convenient.
parsed_generation.narration:
At scene one, a shopper approaches a Self-Checkout kiosk in a busy grocery store. The goal is speed and convenience.
The screen lights up as the shopper begins scanning each item, and the kiosk updates with item names and prices in real time.
Items are scanned and placed in the bagging area to keep things organized.
If produce or weighted items are involved, the on screen scale guides the shopper to place them on the bagging area and shows the weight.
When all items are scanned, the shopper proceeds to payment and chooses a method by tapping a card or using a mobile wallet.
A friendly beep confirms successful scans, and the receipt prints for the shopper to review.
The shopper bags the items, checks the receipt, and exits with a smile.
Background info: {background_info}

feedback: Overall aligns with the topic and provides useful contextual cues, with a clear sequence centered on self-checkout. The style is reasonably action-first, but could be tightened to the concise, punchy prompt style seen in the references. Minor detours include exterior shots and an attendant note, which slightly distract from the core shopper-at-kiosk focus.
strengths: Clear step-by-step self-checkout flow with scanning, bagging, and payment.
Detailed camera work cues (angles, close-ups, SFX) to visualize the interaction.
fixes: Tighten narration to match the concise, action-first style of the references; remove or trim generic background lines and meta-notes.
Minimize non-essential elements (e.g., exterior shot, attendant) to maintain strict single-subject focus on the shopper at the self-checkout.
